info.title: RamBase API
info.description: Limited set of API resources from RamBase API. Add query parameter 'clientId' to retrieve API resources your API client has permission to.

get.summary: Customer details for the provided identifier

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Used to add fields to the response

status.description: Status of the customer. 1:New, 2:Pending internal approvement, 4:Active, 9:Obsolete

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

isCompany.description: Indicator if a customer is private entity or a company

firstName.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

preferredLanguage.description: Preferred language for the customer. Is used in prints etc.

externalReference.description: External customer reference/identifier. Can be used in external systems.

internalNote.description: Internal note/notice of the customer. Should not be visible to the customer.

isRelatedBusinessEntity.description: Identify if a customer is related business entity to the company

vATRegistrationNumber.description: Unique number assigned by the relevant tax authority to identify a party for use in relation to value added tax (VAT).

useStandardVATNumberRules.description: Do not automatically replace the VAT number based on the location configuration

eORINumber.description: An EORI (Economic Operator Registration and Identification number) number is required of any party intending to import into the EU or export from the EU.

createdBy.description: The employee (might be RamBase-server) that created the customer

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

backlogAmount.description: Total amount of sales orders, excluding value added tax, that not yet has been fulfilled.

backlogAmountIncludingVAT.description: Total amount of sales orders, including value added tax, that not yet has been fulfilled

salesDistrict.description: A geographic district for which an individual salesperson or sales team holds responsibility

sector.description: The sector the customer belongs to.

minimumGrossMargin.description: The minimum gross margin in percent for the customer

vATHandling.description: Specifies how value added tax (VAT) should be calculated. Either always include VAT, always exclude VAT or use standard/default VAT rules.

warrantyPeriod.description: Agreement of default warranty period in months

feeAmount.description: This is an amount, in the companies local currency, that by default will be added as fee when a sales order is created for this customer.

volumePriceAgreement.description: Special price agreement related to the quantity beeing ordered.

exchangeRateFluctuationAgreement.description: When a sales order is issued, RamBase stores the current exchange rate and the currency the product normally is purchased in. The exchange rate might have changed when the invoice is issued. The exchange rate fluctuation agreement specifies how to handle these differences. The agreement has the format AAA/BBB, where AAA is a percentage of the total invoice, and BBB is the exchange rate fluctuation percentage. E.g. 100/3.0 means that if the rate of exchange on the date a sales order is forwarded to an invoice has changed more than +/- 3% from the rate of exchange, 100% of the invoice amount will be adjusted.

blockSalesOrderRegistration.description: True if sales orders for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to sales orders for this customer.

blockSalesQuoteRegistration.description: True if sales quotes for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to sales quotes for this customer.

latestSalesOrderDate.description: Date of latest sales order or sales order request registration.

deliveryTerms.description: Default delivery terms for the customer. The delivery terms is based on the Incoterms rules from ICC (International Chamber of Commerce).

deliveryTermPlace.description: Named place related to delivery terms (Incoterms)

onlyShipEntireSalesOrders.description: True if all items of a sales order should be shipped together. The items of a sales order should never be split into several shipments. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

onlyShipEntireSalesOrderItems.description: True if the total quantity of a sales order item always should be shipped together. The quantity should never be split into several shipments. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

avoidMultipleShipmentsOnSameDate.description: True if all items of a sales order with the same sheduled delivery date should be shipped together. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

shipBasedOnConfirmedDeliveryDate.description: If true, will sheduled shipping date on each item be calculated based on confirmed date rather than requested date.

freightForEachShipment.description: If unchecked there will only be calculated freight on one shipping advice if the particular sales order has serveral shipments.

shippingDay.description: Specifies when the goods should be shipped. This is used to calculate the scheduled shipping date for each item.

consolidateShippingAdvices.description: If true, sales orders will be consolidated when creating shipping advices via the "Prepare for picking" process  the . If false, each sales order will result in seperate shipping advice. The field to use when consolidating is specified in the ShippingAdviceConsolidationField.

shippingAdviceConsolidationField.description: Field to use when consolidating sales order items into shipping advices in the "Prepare for picking" process.

shippingAdviceItemSortBy.description: Items in consolidated shipping advices will be sorted by this fields when they are created in the 'Prepare for picking' process

requireApprovalIfOverdue.description: True if  shipments need approval if there are sales invoices with overdue amount. Default value is retireved from setting: DefaultCreateValueCUSFieldDUEAPPROVE

blockShipping.description: True if shipping advices for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to shipping advices for this customer.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

interestRate.description: Interest rate used for sales invoices past duedate

interestFeeAmount.description: Fixed interest fee used for the customer.

salesInvoiceConsolidation.description: Specifies whether or how often shipping advices that origins from this sales order will be consolidated when creating sales invoices.

salesInvoiceConsolidationField.description: Field name to group by when consolidating shipping advice items into sales invoices.

salesInvoiceItemSortBy.description: Field name to sort by when creating sales invoice items.

sendReminders.description: Set to false if reminder are not be sent to this customer. Default value is retireved from setting: DefaultCreateValueCUSFieldREMINDER

latestSalesInvoiceDate.description: Date last sales invoice was registered.

sendToFactoring.description: Identify which customer, invoices ands credit notes, will be send to factoring

paymentTerms.description: Default payment terms to use in new documents.

paymentMethod.description: Default payment method for the customer

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

balance.description: Total balance for the customer, without value added tax

balanceIncludingVAT.description: Total balance for the customer. Positive amount indicates how much the customer owes. Negative amount indicates that the customer has a credit balance.

billingYTDAmount.description: Total amount of invoices and credit notes that has been invoiced this year (to current date)

overdueAmount.description: Total amount of unpaid invoices which has passed due date

creditLimit.description: The maximum amount that the customer may charge on a credit card or borrow from a financial institution.

creditInsuranceAmount.description: Credit amount insured for the customer

creditInsuranceCompany.description: Insurance company used by the customer for credit insurance

feePercent.description: The commission paid by the customer when purchasing LOTs

latestBidDate.description: Last date the customer placed a bid.

supplier.description: Every customer in auction companies has a cross-reference to a supplier.

totalBalance.description: Sum of customer and cross referenced supplier balances

totalOverdueAmount.description: Sum of customer and cross referenced supplier overdued amounts

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

isCompany.description: Indicator if a customer is private entity or a company

firstName.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

preferredLanguage.description: Preferred language for the customer. Is used in prints etc.

externalReference.description: External customer reference/identifier. Can be used in external systems.

internalNote.description: Internal note/notice of the customer. Should not be visible to the customer.

isRelatedBusinessEntity.description: Identify if a customer is related business entity to the company

vATRegistrationNumber.description: Unique number assigned by the relevant tax authority to identify a party for use in relation to value added tax (VAT).

useStandardVATNumberRules.description: Do not automatically replace the VAT number based on the location configuration

eORINumber.description: An EORI (Economic Operator Registration and Identification number) number is required of any party intending to import into the EU or export from the EU.

salesDistrict.description: A geographic district for which an individual salesperson or sales team holds responsibility

sector.description: The sector the customer belongs to.

minimumGrossMargin.description: The minimum gross margin in percent for the customer

vATHandling.description: Specifies how value added tax (VAT) should be calculated. Either always include VAT, always exclude VAT or use standard/default VAT rules.

warrantyPeriod.description: Agreement of default warranty period in months

feeAmount.description: This is an amount, in the companies local currency, that by default will be added as fee when a sales order is created for this customer.

volumePriceAgreement.description: Special price agreement related to the quantity beeing ordered.

exchangeRateFluctuationAgreement.description: When a sales order is issued, RamBase stores the current exchange rate and the currency the product normally is purchased in. The exchange rate might have changed when the invoice is issued. The exchange rate fluctuation agreement specifies how to handle these differences. The agreement has the format AAA/BBB, where AAA is a percentage of the total invoice, and BBB is the exchange rate fluctuation percentage. E.g. 100/3.0 means that if the rate of exchange on the date a sales order is forwarded to an invoice has changed more than +/- 3% from the rate of exchange, 100% of the invoice amount will be adjusted.

blockSalesOrderRegistration.description: True if sales orders for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to sales orders for this customer.

blockSalesQuoteRegistration.description: True if sales quotes for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to sales quotes for this customer.

deliveryTerms.description: Default delivery terms for the customer. The delivery terms is based on the Incoterms rules from ICC (International Chamber of Commerce).

deliveryTermPlace.description: Named place related to delivery terms (Incoterms)

onlyShipEntireSalesOrders.description: True if all items of a sales order should be shipped together. The items of a sales order should never be split into several shipments. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

onlyShipEntireSalesOrderItems.description: True if the total quantity of a sales order item always should be shipped together. The quantity should never be split into several shipments. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

avoidMultipleShipmentsOnSameDate.description: True if all items of a sales order with the same sheduled delivery date should be shipped together. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

shipBasedOnConfirmedDeliveryDate.description: If true, will sheduled shipping date on each item be calculated based on confirmed date rather than requested date.

freightForEachShipment.description: If unchecked there will only be calculated freight on one shipping advice if the particular sales order has serveral shipments.

shippingDay.description: Specifies when the goods should be shipped. This is used to calculate the scheduled shipping date for each item.

consolidateShippingAdvices.description: If true, sales orders will be consolidated when creating shipping advices via the "Prepare for picking" process  the . If false, each sales order will result in seperate shipping advice. The field to use when consolidating is specified in the ShippingAdviceConsolidationField.

shippingAdviceConsolidationField.description: Field to use when consolidating sales order items into shipping advices in the "Prepare for picking" process.

shippingAdviceItemSortBy.description: Items in consolidated shipping advices will be sorted by this fields when they are created in the 'Prepare for picking' process

requireApprovalIfOverdue.description: True if  shipments need approval if there are sales invoices with overdue amount. Default value is retireved from setting: DefaultCreateValueCUSFieldDUEAPPROVE

blockShipping.description: True if shipping advices for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to shipping advices for this customer.

interestRate.description: Interest rate used for sales invoices past duedate

interestFeeAmount.description: Fixed interest fee used for the customer.

salesInvoiceConsolidation.description: Specifies whether or how often shipping advices that origins from this sales order will be consolidated when creating sales invoices.

salesInvoiceConsolidationField.description: Field name to group by when consolidating shipping advice items into sales invoices.

salesInvoiceItemSortBy.description: Field name to sort by when creating sales invoice items.

sendReminders.description: Set to false if reminder are not be sent to this customer. Default value is retireved from setting: DefaultCreateValueCUSFieldREMINDER

sendToFactoring.description: Identify which customer, invoices ands credit notes, will be send to factoring

feePercent.description: The commission paid by the customer when purchasing LOTs

post.summary:
Creates a new item in provided sales order.

Note that Discount will be ignored when DiscountPercent is provided. 
Note also that Discount, DiscountPercent and GrossPrice will be ignored when GrossMargin is provided.

requestedDeliveryDate.description: The delivery date as requested by the customer.

customersReferenceNumber.description: Customers item reference number. Typically to the customers internal system.

customersProductName.description: Customers internal name of the product. Retrieved from the product.

equivalentProductName.description: Name of product with equivalent behavior and attributes. Can be used for same purpose.

requestedProductStructureRevision.description: The revision will typically be a major change, as opposed to minor changes stored in the version of the product structure.

productDescription.description: Description of the item. If not specified, the description is by default copied from the product.

note.description: Additional information regarding the item (free text). Might be visible to customers/suppliers.

grossMargin.description: Gross margin of the item. An eventual approval of GM is triggered if this percentage is lower than the highest value of minimum gross margin set up in Customer, Product and  GM in COM

discountPercent.description: The discount in percent for this item.

grossPrice.description: Represents the price per unit before any discounting is applied.

discount.description: Discount for each unit in the item, in document currency.  Will be calculated based on Discount percentage, or can be set manually.

seller.description: Reference to the seller of the item

purchaseCurrency.description: Purchase currency is the currency this product normally is purchased in. This is also the base currency used in the gross margin calculation. By default the purchase currency is retrieved from the product.

purchaseExchangeRate.description: Exchange rate between document currency and purchase currency. Used in landed cost calculations.

startDate.description: Start date of subscription or rental item

estimatedEndDate.description: Expected end date of subscription or rental item

priceChangeAgreement.description: Defines if and how the recurring price can be updated

get.summary: List of all order items for specified sales order

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Used to add fields to the response

lineNumber.description: Line- or sequence number of the item. The LineNumber is used for sorting items in applications, prints, reports etc.

status.description: Status of the sales order item (0-9).

requestedDeliveryDate.description: The delivery date as requested by the customer.

confirmedDeliveryDate.description: Confirmed date of delivery. Date of which the customer can expect the arriving goods

isConfirmedDeliveryDateLocked.description: If confirmed delivery date in sales order item (COA) is locked, this date should not be re-calculated automatically.

customersReferenceNumber.description: Customers item reference number. Typically to the customers internal system.

customersProductName.description: Customers internal name of the product. Retrieved from the product.

productDescription.description: Description of the item. If not specified, the description is by default copied from the product.

note.description: Additional information regarding the item (free text). Might be visible to customers/suppliers.

discountPercent.description: The discount in percent for this item.

remainingQuantity.description: Remaining number of units to be forwarded.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossPrice.description: Represents the price per unit before any discounting is applied.

netPrice.description: Final price per unit after deducting all discounts etc.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossAmount.description: Represents the item amount before any discounts etc. is applied.

netAmount.description: Final item amount after deducting all discounts etc.

priceChangeAgreement.description: Defines if and how the recurring price can be updated

startDate.description: Start date of subscription or rental item

expectedEndDate.description: Expected end date of subscription or rental item

salesOrderItemLink.description: Reference to the sales order item.

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

isCompany.description: Indicator if a customer is private entity or a company

firstName.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

preferredLanguage.description: Preferred language for the customer. Is used in prints etc.

externalReference.description: External customer reference/identifier. Can be used in external systems.

internalNote.description: Internal note/notice of the customer. Should not be visible to the customer.

isRelatedBusinessEntity.description: Identify if a customer is related business entity to the company

vATRegistrationNumber.description: Unique number assigned by the relevant tax authority to identify a party for use in relation to value added tax (VAT).

salesDistrict.description: A geographic district for which an individual salesperson or sales team holds responsibility

sector.description: The sector the customer belongs to.

minimumGrossMargin.description: The minimum gross margin in percent for the customer

vATHandling.description: Specifies how value added tax (VAT) should be calculated. Either always include VAT, always exclude VAT or use standard/default VAT rules.

warrantyPeriod.description: Agreement of default warranty period in months

feeAmount.description: This is an amount, in the companies local currency, that by default will be added as fee when a sales order is created for this customer.

The exchange rate might have changed when the invoice is issued. The exchange rate fluctuation agreement specifies how to handle these differences. The agreement has the format AAA/BBB, where AAA is a percentage of the total invoice, and BBB is the exchange rate fluctuation percentage. E.g. 100/3.0 means that if the rate of exchange on the date a sales order is forwarded to an invoice has changed more than +/- 3% from the rate of exchange, 100% of the invoice amount will be adjusted.

If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

freightForEachShipment.description: If unchecked there will only be calculated freight on one shipping advice if the particular sales order has serveral shipments.

shippingDay.description: Specifies when the goods should be shipped. This is used to calculate the scheduled shipping date for each item.

shippingAdviceItemSortBy.description: Items in consolidated shipping advices will be sorted by this fields when they are created in the 'Prepare for picking' process

requireApprovalIfOverdue.description: True if  shipments need approval if there are sales invoices with overdue amount. Default value is retireved from setting: DefaultCreateValueCUSFieldDUEAPPROVE

interestRate.description: Interest rate used for sales invoices past duedate

interestFeeAmount.description: Fixed interest fee used for the customer.

paymentMethod.description: Default payment method for the customer

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Used to add fields to the response

status.description: Status of the customer. 1:New, 2:Pending internal approvement, 4:Active, 9:Obsolete

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

isCompany.description: Indicator if a customer is private entity or a company

firstName.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

internalNote.description: Internal note/notice of the customer. Should not be visible to the customer.

externalReference.description: External customer reference/identifier. Can be used in external systems.

vATRegistrationNumber.description: Unique number assigned by the relevant tax authority to identify a party for use in relation to value added tax (VAT).

useStandardVATNumberRules.description: Do not automatically replace the VAT number based on the location configuration

billingYTDAmount.description: Total amount of invoices and credit notes that has been invoiced this year (to current date)

blockSalesOrderRegistration.description: True if sales orders for this customer should be blocked/denied/rejected registration. A notification of type "Stop" will also be added to sales orders for this customer.

get.summary: Details about a specific item of an order

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Used to add fields to the response

status.description: Status of the sales order item (0-9).

lineNumber.description: Line- or sequence number of the item. The LineNumber is used for sorting items in applications, prints, reports etc.

requestedDeliveryDate.description: The delivery date as requested by the customer.

confirmedDeliveryDate.description: Confirmed date of delivery. Date of which the customer can expect the arriving goods

isConfirmedDeliveryDateLocked.description: If confirmed delivery date in sales order item (COA) is locked, this date should not be re-calculated automatically.

scheduledShippingDate.description: Date when the goods was/will be shipped from the warehouse.

customersReferenceNumber.description: Customers item reference number. Typically to the customers internal system.

customersProductName.description: Customers internal name of the product. Retrieved from the product.

equivalentProductName.description: Name of product with equivalent behavior and attributes. Can be used for same purpose.

requestedProductStructureRevision.description: The revision will typically be a major change, as opposed to minor changes stored in the version of the product structure.

hasStockAssignmentsWithRevisionMismatch.description: Is linked to a stock assignment (SAR) with a product structure revision that mismatches the requested product structure revision on the sales order item.

productDescription.description: Description of the item. If not specified, the description is by default copied from the product.

note.description: Additional information regarding the item (free text). Might be visible to customers/suppliers.

grossMargin.description: Gross margin of the item. An eventual approval of GM is triggered if this percentage is lower than the highest value of minimum gross margin set up in Customer, Product and  GM in COM

discountPercent.description: The discount in percent for this item.

remainingQuantity.description: Remaining number of units to be forwarded.

shippedQuantity.description: Quantity forwarded to one or more shipping advices

allocatedStockQuantity.description: The quantity of this item which do have assignments from stock

requireSerialNumberBeforeShipping.description: True if serial number is required before shipping. Note that if the product has set this value to true, this can not be overridden.

isBlockedForProduction.description: True if a new production is not to be started automatically based on this sales order item.

isPaymentCoveredByWarranty.description: True if payment of item will be covered by warranty. For sales order items that are a part of the repair process, it means that these will not be invoiced.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossPrice.description: Represents the price per unit before any discounting is applied.

discount.description: Discount for each unit in the item, in document currency.  Will be calculated based on Discount percentage, or can be set manually.

netPrice.description: Final price per unit after deducting all discounts etc.

expectedPrice.description: The expected price from the sales order request item this sales order item was forwarded from.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossPrice.description: Represents the price per unit before any discounting is applied.

netPrice.description: Final price per unit after deducting all discounts.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossAmount.description: Represents the item amount before any discounts etc. is applied.

netAmount.description: Final item amount after deducting all discounts etc.

remainingAmount.description: Total remaining value of item in document currency. The sum of remaining quantity and open forwarded quantity, multiplied with netprice

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossAmount.description: Total gross amount in company currency.

netAmount.description: Total net amount in company currency.

remainingAmount.description: Total remaining amount in company currency.

shortName.description: Unique abbreviation/short name of the location

seller.description: Reference to the seller of the item

unit.description: Measurement unit (ex. mm, km, dl, kg)

precision.description: The precision/accuracy of the measurement (number of decimals)

countryOfOriginCode.description: Two-character code (ISO 3166) identifying the default country where the product is produced. This value is inherrited from the assigned goods reception(s). If not country of origin is specified for the goods reception(s), country of origin is retrieved from the product. If assigned to multiple goods receptions with different origin, the field will be empty.

customField1.description: Custom field for grouping, sorting, categorizing and other purposes.

customField2.description: Custom field for grouping, sorting, categorizing and other purposes.

standardLeadTime.description: The expected lead time, in number of days, from ordering from supplier to goods reception. Used in different purchase processes, typically when supplier is unknown. Note that this might differ from the standard lead times defined on the different suppliers.

weight.description: The weight of the product in kilograms.

isNonStock.description: True if this is a non-physical product which are no using assignments from the assignment archive

purchaseCurrency.description: Purchase currency is the currency this product normally is purchased in. This is also the base currency used in the gross margin calculation. By default the purchase currency is retrieved from the product.

freight.description: Estimated freight cost of getting each unit in stock. Used for calculating landed cost.

duty.description: Duty cost of getting each unit in stock. Used for calculating landed cost.

charge.description: Other costs of getting each unit in stock. Used for calculating landed cost.

grossPrice.description: Total cost (landed cost or true cost) of getting each unit in stock, including purchase price, duties, charges, freight etc.

purchaseExchangeRate.description: Exchange rate between document currency and purchase currency. Used in landed cost calculations.

isDerivedFromUserInput.description: True if landed cost is derived from manual user input. Landed cost can only be manually updated for products without assignments

isDerivedFromPreferredPurchasePrice.description: True if the landed cost for this item is derived from preferred purchase price. This means that parts (or all) of the item has not reserved goods in stock, nor incoming goods (supplier backlog or production backlog).

isDerivedFromAssignedSupplierBacklog.description: True if landed cost for this item is derived from assigned supplier backlog. This means that the item has reserved incoming goods (supplier backlog or production backlog).

isDerivedFromAssignedStock.description: True if landed cost for this item is derived from assigned stock. This means that the item has reserved goods in stock.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

grossPrice.description: Total cost (landed cost or true cost) in sales currency

vATCode.description: Code that determines VAT rules used for VAT calculations.

department.description: The department related to the item. One of the system/fixed account dimensions.

financeProject.description: The finance project related to the item. One of the system/fixed account dimensions.

asset.description: The asset related to the item. One of the system/fixed account dimensions.

accounting.description: Accounting details for the item, including fixed/system dimensions. For all dimensions, see seperate resource.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

forwardedNetAmount.description: The net amount forwarded to this item.

forwardedQuantity.description: The quantity forwarded to this item.

causedBy.description: States who has requested the change of the sales order.

changeReason.description: States the reason why the sales order item was forwarded

ramBaseKey.description: Internal RamBase identifier of the object/item

openForwardedQuantity.description: When items are forwarded they end up in one or more open items. Open items in this context means items that are not registered (status 0 or 1). OpenForwardedQuantity will be the sum of ForwardedQuantity of all items this item has been forwarded to.

ramBaseKey.description: Internal RamBase identifier of the object/item

items.description: Item this item was forwarded to.

goodsHandling.description: Specifies how the goods should be handled

accountingHandling.description: Specifies how accounting should handle the deviation

interCompanyHandling.description: Specifies how the deviation should be handled in the inter company trading.

landedCostCalculation.description: Specifies how landed cost should be calculated.

startDate.description: Start date of subscription or rental item

expectedEndDate.description: Expected end date of subscription or rental item

priceChangeAgreement.description: Defines if and how the recurring price can be updated

estimatedAmount.description: Estimated amount of rental or subscription item

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

hasOneTimeFee.description: Boolean indicating if the recurring price has a one-time fee.

hasUsageStep.description: Boolean indicating if the recurring price has any usage steps.

projectOrderItemLink.description: Reference to the project order item.

field.description: Field to get value from in the other company sales order

value.description: Value for the field from the sales order in the other company

intercompanySalesOrderReference.description: If this sales order is created based on a purchase order from another company, these fields will be referencing the sales order which is assigned to the purchase order in the other company.

get.summary: Sales order details for the provided identifier

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Used to add fields to the response

customersReferenceNumber.description: Customers reference number. E.g. the internal sales order id the customer use in their own system.

volumePriceAgreement.description: Special price agreement related to the quantity beeing ordered.

exchangeRateFluctuationAgreement.description: When a sales order is issued, RamBase stores the current exchange rate and the currency the product normally is purchased in. The exchange rate might have changed when the invoice is issued. The exchange rate fluctuation agreement specifies how to handle these differences. The agreement has the format AAA/BBB, where AAA is a percentage of the total invoice, and BBB is the exchange rate fluctuation percentage. E.g. 100/3.0 means that if the rate of exchange on the date a sales order is forwarded to an invoice has changed more than +/- 3% from the rate of exchange, 100% of the invoice amount will be adjusted.

netWeight.description: Total weight  (excluding packing material) in kilograms, calculated based on weight of all included products.

grossMargin.description: Gross margin of sale, calculated as an average of gross margin of all items at the time items are created and when the document is registered. Will not be recalculated if gross margin in items change afterwards

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

hasAttachmentsToForward.description: Has attachements that will be included when forwarded to other transaction documents.

note.description: Additional information regarding the object (free text). This note might be visible to customers/suppliers.

shippingAddressAttention.description: Attention of the shipping address. When changing shipping address, the ShippingAddressAttention will be overridden by the attention of the new shipping address.

shippingAddressPhone.description: Phone number of the shipping address. When changing shipping address, the ShippingAddressPhone will be overridden by the phone number of the new shipping address.

shippingAddressEmail.description: Email address of the shipping address. When changing shipping address, the ShippingAddressEmail will be overridden by the email of the new shipping address.

invoiceAddressAttention.description: Attention of the invoice address. When changing invoice address, the InvoiceAddressAttention will be overridden by the attention of the new invoice address.

locationCountryCode.description: Country code of the location. Inherits from the location.

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

firstname.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

salesDistrict.description: A geographic district for which an individual salesperson or sales team holds responsibility

name.description: Name of receiver (Name of company or last name of a person). Note that default invoice address must have the same name as the customer.

firstname.description: Firstname if the receiver is a person. Note that default invoice address must have the same firstname as the customer.

externalReference.description: External address identifier. Normally defined by the customer.

name.description: Name of receiver (Name of company or last name of a person). Note that default invoice address must have the same name as the customer.

firstname.description: Firstname if the receiver is a person. Note that default invoice address must have the same firstname as the customer.

currency.description: Currency used in conversion. Default is company accounting currency. Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard.

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate used in convertion

subTotalAmount.description: Total amount of the object in company currency, excluding VAT.

vATAmount.description: Value added tax amount in company currency.

totalAmount.description: The total amount in company currency, including VAT.

grossMarginAmount.description: Gross margin of sale presented in local currency. This is calculated as an average of gross margin of all items at the time the document is registered. Will not be recalculated if gross margin in items change afterwards.

deliveryTerms.description: Delivery terms when shipping the goods. The delivery terms is based on the Incoterms rules from ICC (International Chamber of Commerce). The delivery terms is by default retrieved from the customer.

deliveryTermPlace.description: Named place related to delivery terms (Incoterms)

onlyShipEntireSalesOrder.description: True if all items of a sales order should be shipped together. The items of a sales order should never be split into several shipments. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

onlyShipEntireSalesOrderItems.description: True if the total quantity of a sales order item always should be shipped together. The quantity should never be split into several shipments. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

avoidMultipleShipmentsOnSameDate.description: True if all items of a sales order with the same sheduled delivery date should be shipped together. If sales order is forwarded to shipping advice by bulk handling, this will be controlled by RamBase. Manually forward requires that the users controls this themselves.

shipBasedOnConfirmedDeliveryDate.description: If true, will sheduled shipping date on each item be calculated based on confirmed date rather than requested date.

freightForEachShipment.description: If unchecked there will only be calculated freight on one shipping advice if the particular sales order has serveral shipments.

shippingDay.description: Specifies when the goods should be shipped. This is used to calculate the scheduled shipping date for each item.

consolidateShippingAdvices.description: If true, sales orders will be consolidated when creating shipping advices via the "Prepare for picking" process  the . If false, each sales order will result in seperate shipping advice. The field to use when consolidating is specified in the ShippingAdviceConsolidationField.

shippingAdviceConsolidationField.description: Field to use when consolidating sales order items into shipping advices in the "Prepare for picking" process.

shippingAdviceItemSortBy.description: Items in consolidated shipping advices will be sorted by this fields when they are created in the 'Prepare for picking' process

salesInvoiceConsolidation.description: Specifies whether or how often shipping advices that origins from this sales order will be consolidated when creating sales invoices.

salesInvoiceConsolidationField.description: Field name to group by when consolidating shipping advice items into sales invoices.

salesInvoiceItemSortBy.description: Field name to sort by when creating sales invoice items.

paymentTerms.description: Terms of payment. Defaut value is retrieved from the customer. The due date of the sales order and sales invoice is calculated based on this field.

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment. Default value is retrieved from the customer.

dueDate.description: Date the sales order is due to be paid. Only relevant for pre-paid orders.

vATHandling.description: Specifies how value added tax (VAT) should be calculated. Either always include VAT, always exclude VAT or use standard/default VAT rules.

useStandardVATNumberRules.description: Do not automatically replace the VAT number based on the location configuration

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Used to add fields to the response

customersReferenceNumber.description: Customers reference number. E.g. the internal sales order id the customer use in their own system.

netWeight.description: Total weight  (excluding packing material) in kilograms, calculated based on weight of all included products.

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

firstname.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

currency.description: Currency used in conversion. Default is company accounting currency. Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard.

subTotalAmount.description: Total amount of the object in company currency, excluding VAT.

totalAmount.description: The total amount in company currency, including VAT.

grossMarginAmount.description: Gross margin of sale presented in local currency. This is calculated as an average of gross margin of all items at the time the document is registered. Will not be recalculated if gross margin in items change afterwards.

name.description: Name of customer (name of company or surname/familyname/lastname of a person)

firstName.description: Secondary name of a company or firstname of a person

vATRegistrationNumber.description: Unique number assigned by the relevant tax authority to identify a party for use in relation to value added tax (VAT).

salesOrderItemLink.description: Reference to the sales order item.

InitialSalesOrderItem.description: Reference to the initial/first/original sales order item in the document flow for this item.

pageSize.description: Number of elements in the list, as defined in $top. Default is 10.

position.description: Position of the first element in the list

firstPageKey.description: Page key to use for navigating to the first page in the list

firstPage.description: Link to the first page in the list. $pageKey is set to FirstPageKey.

previousPageKey.description: Page key to use for navigating to previous page in the list

previousPage.description: Link to the previous page in the list. $pageKey is set to PreviousPageKey.

nextPageKey.description: Page key to use for navigating to next page in the list

nextPage.description: Link to the next page in the list. $pageKey is set to NextPageKey.

lastPageKey.description: Page key to use for navigating to last page in the list

lastPage.description: Link to the last page in the list. $pageKey is set to LastPageKey.

size.description: Total number of records in the list. Use $inlinecount=allpages in the request uri to include this

Paging.description: Detailed paging information for this list.

currencyCode.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

AccountManager.description: Reference to the employee who is responsible for the management of sales, and relationship with the customer.

specialHandlingId.description: The special handling code used for this customer.

specialHandlingLink.description: The special handling code used for this customer.

SalesAssistant.description: Reference to the employee who is sales assistant for the customer.

message.description: The message from the notification definition, expanded with parameters.

translatedMessage.description: The translated message from the notification definition, expanded with parameters.

category.description: Category of notification type (warning, information etc)

shortName.description: Unique abbreviation/short name of the location

Assignee.description: The user who has been assigned to work with this object.

planner.description: Reference to the employee who is a production management planner.

projectLeader.description: Reference to the employee who is a production management project leader.

documentController.description: Reference to the employee who is a production management document controller.

Management.description: Represents a group of users, which are assigned to particular management roles.

currency.description: Three character code following the ISO 4217 standard

freightAmount.description: Freight amount in transaction document's currency

feeAmount.description: Fee amount in transaction document's currency

subTotalAmount.description: Total amount of the object in object currency, excluding VAT.

vATAmount.description: Total value added tax in object currency.

totalAmount.description: The total amount in object currency, including VAT

grossMarginAmount.description: Gross margin of sale presented in sales currency. This is calculated as an average of gross margin of all items at the time the document is registered. Will not be recalculated if gross margin in items change afterwards.

code.description: Intercompany database the customer belongs to.

SalesAssistant1.description: Reference to the employee who is sales assistant for the customer.

AccountManager1.description: Reference to the employee who is responsible for the management of sales, and relationship with the customer.

specialHandlingId.description: The special handling code used for this customer.

paymentTerms.description: Terms of payment. Defaut value is retrieved from the customer. The due date of the sales order and sales invoice is calculated based on this field.

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment. Default value is retrieved from the customer.

creditLimit.description: The maximum amount that the customer may charge on a credit card or borrow from a financial institution.

creditInsuranceAmount.description: Credit amount insured for the customer

creditInsuranceCompany.description: Insurance company used by the customer for credit insurance

discountPercentage.description: The discount percentage that should be used when the customer creates a new rental or subscription item in a rental contract

select.name: $select
select.description: Limit the number of fields in the response

pagekey.name: $pageKey
pagekey.description: Navigate to first-, previous, next- or last page in list

db.name: $db
db.description: Database of the company to request

useMinimumVersion.name: $useMinimumVersion
useMinimumVersion.description: Used to run a new version of an API resource when your API client is running a deprecated API resource.

inlineCount.name: $inlineCount
inlineCount.description: Set to 'allpages' to include total number of rows in the response.

top.name: $top
top.description: Specifies number of rows to return in each page.

lang.name: $lang
lang.description: Language to use in the response. 3-letter language code.

showCustomFields.name: $showCustomFields
showCustomFields.description: Set to true to include/use custom fields. Default value is false.

showDomainValues.name: $showDomainValues
showDomainValues.description: Set to true to include domain descriptions for fields using domain values. Default value is false.
